bash — practice terminal type a command, or use “Run” from a hint

Commit graph

Working tree & staging

Cheat sheet

git rebase -i — rewrite these commits
Applied top → bottom (oldest first). Reorder with ↑↓. pick keep · reword change message · squash fold into the one above (keep message) · fixup fold in (drop message) · drop discard.
file
This file has conflict markers. Remove <<<, ===, >>> and keep the content you want.
